explanations.15: The --mount=type=cache option tells Docker to reuse the apt package cache across builds, which speeds things up and saves space.
explanations.16: The 'set -eux' command makes the shell script strict: it exits on errors, shows each command that runs, and fails if any variable is undefined.
explanations.37: Similar to line 15, this caches pip's downloaded packages so rebuilding the image doesn't re-download everything.
explanations.47: Tini is a small init process that properly handles signals and zombie processes when your app runs inside the container.
explanations.49: This adds the 'src' folder to Python's search path, so your code can import modules from that directory without specifying the full path.
